---
title: "ir end-to-end smoke test"
format: gfm
ir:
  dependencies:
    - jsonlite
  exclude-newer: "2026-06-01"
---

This document is rendered by the `ir` integration tests through a real Quarto
install. The chunk below records facts about the R session that knitr ran in,
so the test can prove `ir` injected the resolved library (via `R_LIBS`) and the
selected R (via `QUARTO_R`) all the way down to the knitr engine.

If `ir` failed to inject the resolved library, `jsonlite` would not be on
`.libPaths()` and this chunk would error, failing the render.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
facts <- list(
  r_version = as.character(getRversion()),
  libpaths = .libPaths(),
  jsonlite_location = normalizePath(find.package("jsonlite"), winslash = "/"),
  jsonlite_version = as.character(packageVersion("jsonlite"))
)

out <- Sys.getenv("IR_E2E_FACTS")
if (!nzchar(out)) stop("IR_E2E_FACTS is not set")
jsonlite::write_json(facts, out, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE)
```
